title: Your AI Executive Team Starts Here
description: Welcome slide introducing GalaxyBots.ai and what the guide covers — log in, connect with bots, deploy a team, and stay in control through the Command Center.
speakerNotes: Welcome to GalaxyBots dot A-I — Fortune 500 intelligence, at your command.

title: Step 1: Log In
description: Navigate to your GalaxyBots URL. Enter email and password. SSO auto-detection for company domains.
speakerNotes: Start by navigating to your GalaxyBots URL. Enter your email and password, then click Sign In. SSO is automatic.

title: Step 2: Your Command Center
description: Activity Feed — live bot action log. Pending Approvals — actions awaiting sign-off. Company Status — real-time fleet health. Mission control for your AI team.
speakerNotes: The Command Center is your operations hub. Activity Feed, Pending Approvals, Company Status — everything in one place.

title: Step 3: Meet Your Bot Team
description: CFO Bot: financial analysis, P&L, budgeting. Marketing Director: campaign strategy, brand, competitive intel. CMO Bot: GTM strategy, lead gen, Prospector pipeline. Full corporate roster of AI executives.
speakerNotes: GalaxyBots comes pre-loaded with a full corporate roster — explore the full Bots section to see your entire team.

title: Step 4: Open a Channel
description: Navigate to Bots in left sidebar. Browse roster, select specialist (e.g., CMO Bot). Click Open Channel. Private, dedicated line to that executive.
speakerNotes: In the left sidebar, navigate to Bots. Select your specialist and click Open Channel — your direct line is live.

title: Step 5: Send Your Directive
description: Plain language instructions — no special commands. Example: Analyze our Q2 revenue and flag areas of concern. CFO Bot pulls data, identifies margin compression, flags cost centers.
speakerNotes: Your bots understand plain language. Be specific, be direct, and your bots will deliver.

title: Pro Tip: Enable Deep Thinking Mode
description: 10 parallel AI perspectives synthesized before response. Use for: market entry analysis, risk assessment, competitive strategy. Enable when stakes are high.
speakerNotes: Deep Thinking Mode synthesizes 10 independent AI perspectives in parallel — designed for decisions that demand depth.

title: Step 6: Deploy a Team
description: 4 stages: Define objective → Optima Prime analyzes → Specialists selected → Task Room launched. Multi-department coordination for complex goals.
speakerNotes: Deploy Team assembles a coordinated group of specialists around a single goal — four stages from objective to execution.

title: Optima Prime: Your AI Commander
description: Analyzes objective across all departments. Proposes the right specialists for the specific task. Suggests new bots if capability gaps exist. Every team precisely matched to the mission.
speakerNotes: Optima Prime doesn't just pick bots — it analyzes your goal to understand which expertise is actually required.

title: Step 7: Lead Your Task Boardroom
description: Shared workspace for the full deployed team. Assign tasks, set priorities, redirect focus. Add specialists mid-session without interruption. Real-time tracking of every bot action.
speakerNotes: The Boardroom is where strategy becomes execution — assign, redirect, add specialists, track everything in real time.

title: Step 8: Managing Approvals
description: Bot surfaces action request → Review in Pending Approvals → Approve (bot proceeds) or Reject (action stopped). Full audit trail of every decision.
speakerNotes: For consequential actions, bots request your approval. You stay in full control with a complete audit trail.

title: You're Ready to Lead
description: 3 core tools: Bots (direct conversations), Deploy Team (coordinated missions), Command Center (oversight). GalaxyBots.ai: Fortune 500 intelligence, at your command.
speakerNotes: You now know how to connect with bots, deploy teams, collaborate in the Boardroom, and govern through the Command Center.

title: Quick Start Reference Card
description: 8 steps: Log in → Command Center → Explore Bots → Open Channel → Send Directive → Deploy Team → Lead Boardroom → Manage Approvals. Key locations: Command Center, Bots, Deploy Team, Boardroom, Approvals.
speakerNotes: Your go-to reference for all 8 steps and key navigation locations.
